debug_info.goal:
A E : Fin 8
hE : E = A + 4
a : ℕ → ℕ
ha_def : ∀ (n : ℕ), a n = Fintype.card { p // A + ∑ i, ↑↑(p i) = E }
n : ℕ
hn : 0 < n
⊢ a (2 * n - 1) = 0

rw [ha_def, Fintype.card_eq_zero]
  rintro ⟨p, hp⟩
  rw [hE, add_right_cancel_iff] at hp
  let f : Fin 8 →+ ZMod 2 :=
    { toFun := fun x => x.val
      map_zero' := rfl
      map_add' := fun x y => (ZMod.nat_cast_of_dvd (by norm_num) (x.val + y.val)).symm }
  apply_fun f at hp
  rw [map_sum, show f 4 = 0 from rfl] at hp
  have h_one : ∀ i, f (p i) = 1 := fun i => by
    rcases Int.units_eq_one_or (p i) with rfl | rfl <;> rfl
  simp [h_one] at hp
  have : Odd (2 * n - 1) := by omega
  rw [ZMod.nat_cast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd] at hp
  exact (Nat.odd_iff_not_even.mp this) hp

      rw [Nat.mod_mod_of_dvd _ (by norm_num : 2 ∣ 8), Nat.add_mod]
      rfl }
  apply_fun f at hp
  simp only [map_sum, AddMonoidHom.coe_mk, ZeroHom.coe_mk] at hp
  have h_term : ∀ i, f (p i) = 1 := fun i => by
    rcases Int.units_eq_one_or (p i) with h | h <;> rw [h] <;> rfl
  simp only [h_term, Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin, nsmul_eq_mul, mul_one] at hp
  have h_odd : ((2 * n - 1 : ℕ) : ZMod 2) = 1 := by
    rw [Nat.cast_sub (by linarith), Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_two, zero_mul, zero_sub]
    rfl
  rw [h_odd] at hp
  exact one_ne_zero hp

rw [ha_def, Fintype.card_eq_zero_iff]
  rintro ⟨p, hp⟩
  rw [hE, add_right_cancel_iff] at hp
  let π : Fin 8 →+ ZMod 2 :=
  { toFun := fun x => x.val
    map_zero' := rfl
    map_add' := fun x y => by
      simp only [Fin.val_add]
      generalize (x.val + y.val) = s
      rw [← Nat.mod_add_div s 8, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_mul]
      norm_num }
  apply congr_arg π at hp
  simp only [map_sum, Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin, nsmul_eq_mul] at hp
  have h_one : ∀ i, π (p i) = 1 := by
    intro i
    rcases Int.units_eq_one_or (p i) with h | h <;> rw [h] <;> rfl
  simp only [h_one, mul_one] at hp
  rw [Nat.cast_sub (by omega)] at hp
  norm_num at hp

rw [ha_def, Fintype.card_eq_zero]
  rintro ⟨p, hp⟩
  rw [hE, add_right_cancel_iff] at hp
  let f : Fin 8 →+ ZMod 2 :=
    { toFun := fun x => x.val
      map_zero' := rfl
      map_add' := fun x y => by
        simp [Fin.val_add]
        exact (Nat.mod_mod_of_dvd _ (by norm_num)).symm }
  apply_fun f at hp
  simp only [map_sum, f] at hp
  have h_odd : ∀ i, (p i : Fin 8).val % 2 = 1 := fun i => by
    rcases Units.eq_one_or_neg_one (p i) with h | h <;> simp [h] <;> decide
  rw [Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i _ => h_odd i)] at hp
  simp only [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin, nsmul_eq_mul, mul_one] at hp
  rw [Nat.cast_sub (by linarith)] at hp
  norm_num at hp
  cases hp

rw [ha_def, Fintype.card_eq_zero_iff]
  rintro ⟨p, hp⟩
  simp only [hE, add_right_cancel_iff] at hp
  let π : Fin 8 →+* ZMod 2 := ZMod.castHom (by norm_num) (ZMod 2)
  apply_fun π at hp
  simp only [map_sum, map_natCast] at hp
  have : (4 : ZMod 2) = 0 := rfl
  rw [this] at hp
  have h_one : ∀ i, π (p i) = 1 := fun i => by
    rcases Int.units_eq_one_or (p i) with h | h <;> simp [h]
    rfl
  simp only [h_one, Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_univ, Fintype.card_fin, nsmul_eq_mul, mul_one] at hp
  rw [ZMod.nat_cast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd] at hp
  exact (Nat.even_iff_not_odd.mp hp) (Nat.odd_sub (Nat.succ_le_of_lt <| Nat.mul_pos (by norm_num) hn) (by simp))

rw [ha_def, Fintype.card_eq_zero_iff]
  rintro ⟨p, hp⟩
  rw [hE, add_right_cancel_iff] at hp
  let f : Fin 8 →+ ZMod 2 :=
  { toFun := fun x => x.val
    map_zero' := rfl
    map_add' := fun x y => by
      simp [Fin.val_add, ZMod.nat_cast_mod, Nat.cast_add]
      norm_num }
  apply congr_arg f at hp
  rw [map_sum, show f 4 = 0 by rfl] at hp
  have h : ∀ i, f (p i) = 1 := fun i => by
    cases Int.units_eq_one_or (p i) with
    | inl h => rw [h]; rfl
    | inr h => rw [h]; rfl
  simp [h] at hp
  rw [Nat.cast_sub (by linarith)] at hp
  simp at hp
  contradiction

rw [ha_def, Fintype.card_eq_zero]
  rintro ⟨p, hp⟩
  rw [hE, add_right_cancel_iff] at hp
  let f : Fin 8 →+ ZMod 2 :=
  { toFun := fun x => x.val
    map_zero' := rfl
    map_add' := fun x y => by
      simp [Fin.val_add, ZMod.nat_cast_val]
      rw [Nat.mod_mod_of_dvd _ (by norm_num : 2 ∣ 8), Nat.add_mod] }
  have := congr_arg f hp
  simp only [map_sum, AddMonoidHom.coe_mk, ZeroHom.coe_mk] at this
  have h_one : ∀ i, f (p i) = 1 := fun i => by
    cases Int.units_eq_one_or (p i) <;> simp [f, *]
  simp [h_one, Fin.sum_const, hn] at this
  rw [Nat.cast_sub (by linarith), Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_two, zero_mul, zero_sub] at this
  contradiction

rw [ha_def, Fintype.card_eq_zero_iff]
  rintro ⟨p, hp⟩
  rw [hE, add_right_cancel_iff] at hp
  let f : Fin 8 →+ ZMod 2 :=
  { toFun := fun x => x.val
    map_zero' := rfl
    map_add' := fun x y => by
      simp only [Fin.val_add]
      rw [← Nat.mod_add_div (x.val + y.val) 8]
      simp [show (8 : ZMod 2) = 0 by norm_num] }
  apply_fun f at hp
  simp only [map_sum, f, AddMonoidHom.coe_mk, ZeroHom.coe_mk] at hp
  have h (i : Fin (2 * n - 1)) : ((p i : Fin 8).val : ZMod 2) = 1 := by
    cases Int.units_eq_one_or (p i) <;> simp [*, show (7 : ZMod 2) = 1 by norm_num]
    rfl
  rw [Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i _ => h i)] at hp
  simp only [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_univ, Fintype.card_fin, nsmul_eq_mul, mul_one] at hp
  rw [Nat.cast_sub (by linarith), Nat.cast_mul, show (2 : ZMod 2) = 0 by norm_num, zero_mul, zero_sub] at hp
  norm_num at hp

rw [ha_def, Fintype.card_eq_zero_iff]
  rintro ⟨p, hp⟩
  rw [hE, add_left_cancel_iff] at hp
  apply_fun ZMod.castHom (show 2 ∣ 8 by norm_num) (ZMod 2) at hp
  simp only [map_sum, map_intCast, map_natCast] at hp
  have : ∀ i, ((p i : ℤ) : ZMod 2) = 1 := fun i ↦ by
    rcases Int.units_eq_one_or (p i) with h | h <;> simp [h]
  simp [this, Nat.cast_sub (Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Nat.mul_pos (by norm_num) hn))] at hp
  norm_num at hp
